sheet.text: Details Inspector Close Selected replay window MEO continuity hold State 3 of 5 Replay UTC 2026-04-28T09:42:59.089Z Sim replay 00:51 / 01:54 Evidence for the selected replay window. The scene narrative and sequence rail remain primary. State Evidence MEO 暫時接住 · MEO continuity hold 目前由 MEO 暫時接住，覆蓋面廣但延遲略高。模擬預期約 14 分鐘後會有新的候選 LEO 出現。 The simulation holds continuity on the SES O3b mPOWER MEO context in window 3 of 5. This is wider-area continuity by model, not a measured failover. LEO returns as a candidate focus in the next window. Endpoint precision remains operator-family only.
